experience:
Architected and shipped a real-time collaboration feature using WebSockets and React, reducing context-switching for 12,000 daily active users by 34%.
Refactored a monolithic Node.js API into domain-driven microservices, cutting average response latency from 420ms to 95ms and enabling independent deployments.
Led a four-engineer squad to migrate a legacy MySQL schema to PostgreSQL with zero downtime, eliminating $18K/year in licensing costs.
Implemented server-side rendering with Next.js for a marketing platform, improving Core Web Vitals LCP score from 4.2s to 1.1s and lifting organic traffic by 22%.

Built an end-to-end e-commerce checkout flow using Vue 3 and a Django REST backend, increasing checkout completion rate by 18% and processing $2.4M in monthly transactions.
Designed and implemented a role-based access control system used across three internal products, reducing security audit remediation time by 60%.
Optimised Elasticsearch indexing pipelines for a content platform serving 500K monthly visitors, decreasing search query time by 71%.
Delivered a data dashboard with D3.js and Celery background tasks, enabling the analytics team to replace manual reporting and save 20 hours per week.

Developed a React Native fitness tracking app from scratch, achieving 4.7-star ratings across iOS and Android with 80K downloads in the first quarter post-launch.
Integrated BLE sensor communication for wearable device pairing, reducing connection setup time by 55% and improving session reliability to 99.2% uptime.
Introduced end-to-end automated testing with Detox, cutting regression detection time by 40% and enabling bi-weekly release cadences.
Reduced app bundle size by 38% through code-splitting and lazy loading, improving cold-start time on mid-range Android devices by 1.8 seconds.

Built and shipped a Swift/UIKit banking app feature for biometric authentication, supporting 1.2M users and reducing login friction complaints by 47%.
Architected an offline-first data sync layer using Core Data and conflict resolution logic, enabling full functionality in low-connectivity environments reported by field teams.
Mentored two junior iOS developers, establishing code-review practices and architectural conventions that reduced pull-request revision cycles from an average of 3.2 to 1.4.
Collaborated with the design team to implement a SwiftUI component library, reducing feature UI development time by 30% across five product squads.

Developed cross-platform Flutter modules for a healthcare app, enabling a single codebase to serve 200K patients across iOS and Android while meeting HIPAA compliance requirements.
Implemented push notification orchestration using Firebase Cloud Messaging with a local scheduling fallback, increasing appointment reminder open rates from 28% to 61%.
Led performance profiling sessions using Flutter DevTools, resolving a frame-drop issue that reduced jank from 12% to under 2% on target devices.
Integrated payment processing via Stripe SDK with PCI-DSS-compliant tokenisation, supporting $800K in in-app subscription revenue per month.

Designed and deployed a ROS 2-based navigation stack for a warehouse AMR fleet, achieving 99.6% path-completion reliability across 50,000 sq ft of dynamic floor space.
Developed a computer-vision pick-and-place pipeline using a 6-DOF arm and YOLOv8, increasing throughput by 3.2× compared to the previous rule-based system.
Implemented a Kalman filter–based sensor fusion module combining LiDAR, IMU, and wheel odometry, reducing localisation error by 62% in GPS-denied environments.
Wrote hardware-in-the-loop simulation tests in Gazebo, catching 14 critical motion-planning bugs before physical deployment and reducing on-floor test cycles by 45%.

Designed and provisioned a multi-region AWS infrastructure using Terraform, achieving 99.99% uptime SLA and cutting manual provisioning time by 85% through IaC automation.
Built a GitOps CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions and ArgoCD, reducing average deployment lead time from 4 days to under 2 hours for a 15-service Kubernetes cluster.
Optimised cloud spend through right-sizing EC2 instances and migrating batch workloads to Spot, saving $140K annually without degrading SLOs.
Implemented a centralised observability stack using Prometheus, Grafana, and OpenTelemetry, reducing mean time to detect (MTTD) production incidents from 18 minutes to 4 minutes.

Built a customer churn prediction model using XGBoost on 3.2M subscriber records, enabling the retention team to intervene proactively and reduce monthly churn rate from 6.1% to 3.8%.
Designed an automated pricing elasticity dashboard in Tableau backed by a regression pipeline, giving the commercial team real-time margin visibility and contributing to a 9% uplift in quarterly revenue.
Developed an NLP-based sentiment classifier on 18 months of support ticket data using BERT fine-tuning, surfacing product pain points that informed three high-priority roadmap decisions.
Partnered with finance to replace a manual sales-forecasting spreadsheet with a Prophet time-series model, improving 90-day forecast accuracy from 71% to 91% and saving 12 analyst hours per week.

Developed a last-mile delivery route optimisation engine using OR-Tools and reinforcement learning, reducing average vehicle kilometres travelled by 17% across a 400-truck fleet and saving $2.1M annually in fuel costs.
Built a demand forecasting system using LightGBM on 5 years of SKU-level order history, cutting warehouse overstock by 23% and reducing stockout incidents by 31% across 14 distribution centres.
Designed a real-time shipment delay prediction model integrating weather, carrier, and traffic APIs, enabling proactive customer communication and reducing inbound WISMO contacts by 44%.
Implemented an anomaly detection pipeline for freight invoices using isolation forests, flagging $380K in billing discrepancies in the first six months and recovering 94% of contested charges.
